name: Fire King Sky Burn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>焼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target an equal number of "Fire King" monsters you control and cards your opponent controls; destroy them. If a "Fire King" card(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only use 1 "Fire King Sky Burn" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Target an equal number of "Fire King" monsters you control and cards your opponent controls; destroy them. If a "Fire King" card(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead. You can only use 1 "Fire King Sky Burn" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Onslaught of the Fire Kings

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
